demo.title: Demo Election Testing
demo.message_intro: You can create demo candidates for your organisation privately and only people from your organisation can vote in this demo election.
demo.message_confirm_recreate: ⚠️ This will DELETE all existing demo data for your organisation. Are you sure?
demo.message_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
demo.note_isolated: Demo data is isolated to your organisation only. Recreating will delete existing demo data.
demo.note_setup: Setup a demo election to test the voting workflow. All data will be isolated to your organisation.
